chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. M.A.No. 19 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA 2199/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.10.2025. As per the orders passed by this Court on the previous date of hearing notices have been affected by the modes stating therein but none are present on behalf of the appellants though they were also cautioned in respect of the same. Today once again they are called absent without any intimation. Dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE Tufail
